item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: While I like the camera log, I have to agree that the gore is unneeded. Redacting it may be a good compromise, leaving the severity of the whole thing up to the readers imagination.

item.title: Mild -1
item.content:encoded: I have to agree with A Random Day about removing the video log. The punchline and whole story can really wrap up before it and the gore at the end of it really brought me out of the piece and reminded me it’s just a horror story.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You should delete the camera log. The setup and punchline are more than enough without it and the log just detracts from the humor with mediocre dialogue and unnecessary gore.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was wild and I liked it a lot.

There were two mild issues I had. The idea of three drunk mates holding onto this ritual for nine minutes is a bit of a stretch for me, but it's really "not a big deal".

I found the body horror with the leg being severed off to be shocking and hilarious and awesome. But I found the bit about the dude being destroyed through his genitals to come off as sort of gratuitous.

Really good work though all the same. Dives in, gets out, justifies its existence plenty. There are a lot of logistical problems posed by this SCP that I appreciate you did not delve to deeply into solving. +1

item.title: Wasted
item.content:encoded: Sometimes you gotta make a beer run and sometimes you just gotta dance it out with your bros.
